docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76075651) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, DEREN LAI, CHAO HUA AS TO DEFENDANT SPOHN, VINCENT DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-13-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-21-2025
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76075651) TO PLAINTIFF WU, DEREN LAI, CHAO HUA
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76095267) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, DEREN LAI, CHAO HUA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-13-2025 CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO HEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 77096708)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-15-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
